name: Macrometa
description: Macrometa — Multi-model edge database and stream processing platform deployed across 175+ PoPs for low-latency data access.

seo.title: Macrometa — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Macrometa: Macrometa — Multi-model edge database and stream processing platform deployed across 175+ PoPs for low-latency data access.

when_to_use: Multi-model edge database across 175+ PoPs for low latency
Stream processing and data storage colocated at the edge
Sub-10ms reads for globally distributed real-time applications
Document, key-value, and graph storage in one edge platform
Replacing Cloudflare Workers KV with a full edge database

review.verdict: Powerful edge-native database for truly global apps, but mental model and cost demand commitment.
review.best_for: Global real-time apps needing consistent low-latency data access across continents
review.not_for: Single-region apps or teams needing simple CRUD with familiar SQL patterns

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing, scales up and down
